title: Dune : Maker's Crysknife
description: Adds the sacred crysknife from the legendary novel Dune by Frank Herbert to Minecraft.
body:
This mod adds the sacred Fremen weapon, the crysknife, from Frank Herbert's novel _Dune_. It's a must have mod for anyone who wants a Dune-themed world, or even just a new weapon with deadly statistics. As of now, this mod does not require any dependencies and it is very light weight. 

- This weapon can be used as a replacement for your sword. It has a base attack damage of 7 and a base attack speed of 3, making it a weapon optimized for fast critical hits. For comparison the base diamond sword has 7 attack damage but 1.6 attack speed.

- It is found only in desert pyramids; each chest has a 3.125% chance of having the crysknife (other methods of obtaining will be added in the future)

I have a few updates planned for the future including custom enchantments and compatability with other mods.

_9/17/2025: Planning Update 0.2, addition of new crysknife variant and minor rebalancing_

_9/23/2025: Update 0.2 Released, addition of the Fedaykin Crysknife and new advancements_

_10/1/2025: Planning Update 0.3, The Spice Must Flow, to be launched on Halloween 2025_
